name: Berries with Orange-Honey Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
Suggested fruit: Winter: sliced oranges, bananas, kiwi, pineapple, cantaloupe or honeydew; Spring: strawberries, stewed rhubarb; Summer: raspberries, blackberries, blueberries; Fall: peaches, plums, grapes.
Combinations: grapes & melon, melon & blueberries, blackberries & sliced peaches, raspberries & blueberries, strawberries & kiwi, bananas & sliced oranges.
Mix sauce ingredients in a bowl. Wash berries and hull them if necessary. Slice fruit pieces if they are large. Either mix the fruit with the sauce, cover and refrigerate for 1 hour, or at serving time spoon the fruit into individual bowls or stemmed glasses and pour the sauce over it. Garnish each serving.
Serving size: 1/4 recipe = 126 calories; Protein: 5 grams; Fat: 2 grams (3%); Cholesterol: 4 mg; Sodium: 43 mg; Carbohydrates: 24 grams, Fiber: good.
